_meta.name: HCFullPipeline
_meta.description: Heady™ AI Platform 21-Stage (fib(8)) Cognitive Pipeline — φ-scaled throughout, zero magic numbers
_meta.audit: All constants φ-derived per FIXED-VALUE-AUDIT and phi-math-foundation
_meta.dataFlowAudit: 2026-03-11 — all 21 stages verified connected, 6 engine bindings confirmed

fullAutoMode.description: When enabled, pipeline executes all stages autonomously without human checkpoints

steps.name: Scan 3D persistent vector storage (MUST run first)
Scan codebase state and config drift
Scan all service health and attack surface
Classify intent via CSL Resonance Gate
Assign to swarm based on CSL scoring
Decompose into subtask DAG via Rabbit layer
Record trial learnings to vector memory
Spawn bee workers if parallel subtasks exist
Run arena battle for quality selection
Score output: correctness(34%), safety(21%), perf(21%), quality(13%), elegance(11%)
Execute with full context and confidence
Run integration tests and health checks
Identify cognitive blind spots and biases
Review own run — bottlenecks, weaknesses, gaps
Generate prevention rules and anti-regression guards
Inject guards into pipeline and update wisdom.json
Detect dead code, unused services, cost waste
Rank optimization opportunities by CSL impact score
Search for new tools, research, and patterns
Seed mutations with Imagination Engine creative concepts
Embed and store result in vector memory
Emit trust receipt signed with Ed25519

full_path.description: All 21 stages for HIGH/CRITICAL or novel patterns

llm_tokens.description: LLM token budget per pipeline run
llm_tokens.byStage_note: All token budgets are Fibonacci numbers: fib(16)=987, fib(17)=1597, fib(18)=2584, fib(19)=4181, fib(20)=6765, fib(22)=17711

bee_workers.description: Max bee worker agents per pipeline run

cost_usd.description: Max cost per pipeline run in USD

engineBindings._description: All 6 core engines that the pipeline must bind() to at startup for full data flow

dataFlow._description: Explicit stage-to-stage data contracts — every output feeds a downstream input

taskQueuePolicy.description: Every task — discovered, extracted, generated, assigned, or manually created — MUST be registered in this taskQueue and processed through the 21-stage pipeline. No task may bypass the pipeline. No exceptions.

tasks.name: Copy 53 service implementations from bundle into monorepo services/
Copy 14 skill files from bundle into .agents/skills/
Copy 10 app HTML surfaces from bundle into services/heady-web/sites/
Copy 6 shared packages from bundle into packages/
Copy 3 shared service libs (phi-math.js, auto-context-middleware.js, service-base.js) into shared/
Copy docs/ tree (architecture, ADRs, runbooks, onboarding, security) into docs/
Copy infra/ configs (Envoy, Consul, OTel, K8s) into infra/
Wire heady-brain (port 8100) — central AI reasoning engine
Wire heady-testing (port 8403) — integration tests + Arena Mode
Wire heady-auth (port 8510) — central auth relay + signed cookies
Wire heady-cache (port 8603) — hot-cold cache + Fibonacci TTL
Wire api-gateway (port 8701) — request routing + rate limiting
Wire google-mcp (port 8801) — Google Workspace tool adapters
Wire memory-mcp (port 8802) — vector memory as MCP endpoints
Wire perplexity-mcp (port 8803) — Sonar Pro research via MCP
Wire jules-mcp (port 8804) — Jules AI async code delegation
Wire silicon-bridge (port 8807) — Cloudflare Workers AI edge routing
Wire discord-bot (port 8808) — Discord slash commands + webhooks
Wire drupal-sync (port 8809) — Drupal webhook/polling vector sync
Wire budget-tracker (port 8903) — AI provider spend metering
Deploy headyme.com — Cloudflare Pages + sacred geometry (Flower of Life)
Deploy headysystems.com — Cloudflare Pages + sacred geometry (Metatron's Cube)
Deploy heady-ai.com — Cloudflare Pages + sacred geometry (Sri Yantra)
Deploy headyos.com — Cloudflare Pages + sacred geometry (Torus)
Deploy headyconnection.org — Cloudflare Pages + Drupal sync
Deploy headyconnection.com — Cloudflare Pages + community portal
Deploy headyex.com — Cloudflare Pages + marketplace (Fibonacci Spiral)
Deploy headyfinance.com — Cloudflare Pages + investor relations
Deploy auth.headysystems.com — Cloud Run central auth relay
Register OAuth callback URLs in Google developer console
Register OAuth callback URLs in GitHub developer console
Configure Firebase project with valid FIREBASE_API_KEY
Finalize cross-domain cookie exchange pattern for production DNS/TLS
Verify CHANGES.md, GAPS_FOUND.md, IMPROVEMENTS.md exist at repo root
Verify docs/ hierarchy: architecture, ADRs, runbooks, onboarding, security
Verify auth service implements /oauth/google and /oauth/github routes
Verify site generator has no legacy browser-storage or alert-driven OAuth
Deploy Envoy config — mTLS, φ-circuit breakers, EDS→Consul
Deploy Consul config — 3-node bootstrap, ACL, Connect mesh
Deploy OpenTelemetry collector — traces → Google Cloud Trace
Deploy Kubernetes manifests — 54 manifests, phi-scaled HPA, PDB
Configure Docker Compose dev stack — Consul, PostgreSQL/pgvector, OTel
Verify swarm-coordinator-refactored.js merged — CSL domain routing replaces priority queues
Verify bee-factory-refactored.js merged — concurrent equal-status bees
Verify hcfullpipeline-stage4-refactored.js merged — TRIAGE by CSL domain only
Integrate promptfoo — LLM eval + hallucination detection
Integrate Cloudflare Workers AI — edge inference + BGE embeddings
Integrate Firebase Extensions — vector search, email triggers
Deploy drupal-sync service with HMAC-SHA256 webhook verification
Configure 13 Drupal content types for tracking
Enforce: No priority/ranking language in runtime routing, queues, enums, or task classification
Enforce: HeadyAutoContext enriches every request path, site, API call, agent workflow
Enforce: CSL used for domain relevance matching and gating only, not importance ordering
Enforce: Central auth from auth.headysystems.com with httpOnly/Secure/SameSite=Strict cookies
Enforce: Every service emits health status + tracing metadata + registers into service discovery
